channel.title: Powershell on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Powershell on Have an average day :|

item.title: Powershell: Copy Files to Computers from AD & Log it with Excel.
Fun with Powershell
Using PowerShell to remotely install software.
item.description: Holy crap this is been hard! Finding a way to do this has taken some serious searching and reading. So enjoy! http://pastebin.com/LpkJnABj While looking for a way to install software remotely I fond many different methods that worked, kinda. There were some methods that came very close to doing what I wanted it to. However it just didn’t fit. I needed a way to connect to a workstation via domain admin credentials and update or install some software one it.
